name: bandit.structural_bounty_idle_camp_forest_town_mcw
description: Rung-8 narrow live/harness proof for idle-camp structural bounty traffic. A fixture plants a non-player structural forest bounty lead in a ready camp with no smoke/light/direct-range player lure; the run waits through the real hourly structural cadence, requires same-run structural dispatch/stalking/arrival logs, then save-quits and audits persisted harvested/no-active-repeat state.
artifact_patterns: structural outing stalking check kept arrival open lead=overmap_special:bandit_camp@140,51,0#lead:structural_bounty:forest@138,52,0

steps.label: post_load_structural_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the idle structural bounty fixture; this is only startup/load footing before the cadence wait
steps.failure_rule: If gameplay does not load, no structural dispatch proof can be credited.

steps.label: preflight_saved_idle_structural_forest_lead
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world did not contain the five-ready idle camp plus structural forest lead with no active player-pressure state
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains a ready five-member camp, no active outside group, and a fixture structural_bounty forest lead before live cadence proof starts
steps.failure_rule: If the fixture is not idle/no-active or the lead is not structural_bounty/forest, later logs cannot be credited as idle structural bounty proof.

steps.label: wait_3_hours_for_structural_dispatch_stalk_arrival
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the 3-hour duration menu
artifact_state_patterns: structural outing stalking check kept arrival open lead=overmap_special:bandit_camp@140,51,0#lead:structural_bounty:forest@138,52,0
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through real hourly structural maintenance; proof credit depends on same-run debug artifact lines for structural dispatch, stalking-distance writeback, and arrival/harvest, not on the wait UI alone
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks structural dispatch, stalking, and harvest lines for the fixture lead, the probe is inconclusive/red.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_structural_arrival
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the structural arrival probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as a clean saved-state proof.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_structural_arrival
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the structural arrival probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

steps.label: audit_saved_structural_harvest_no_immediate_repeat
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world did not persist the harvested structural lead, returned member, cleared active outing fields, and no immediate repeat active group
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, saved bandit_live_world contains the harvested structural_bounty forest lead with bounty zero, one harvest, all five members ready at home, and no active structural outing
steps.failure_rule: If harvested/bounty-zero/times_harvested state or cleared active outing fields are missing, same-run logs cannot close the saved-state portion of Rung 8.

steps.label: audit_structural_bounty_live_artifact
required_line_patterns: structural outing stalking check kept arrival open lead=overmap_special:bandit_camp@140,51,0#lead:structural_bounty:forest@138,52,0
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show structural candidate planning, dispatch, stalking-distance writeback, and arrival harvest for the idle fixture lead
steps.failure_rule: No Rung-8 structural bounty proof credit if the artifact lacks same-run dispatch, stalking, and harvest lines.

evidence_contract.claim: an idle camp can send non-player structural bounty traffic to a remembered forest lead through the real hourly structural cadence, perform the stalking-distance threat/interest writeback, arrive, harvest the bounty, return the member, clear active outing fields, and persist harvested/no-immediate-repeat saved state without player smoke/light/direct-range bait
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for structural bounty dispatch
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No Rung-8 proof credit if startup/load, saved preflight fixture state, elapsed 3-hour wait, same-run structural dispatch/stalking/arrival artifact, save/writeback, and saved harvested/no-active-repeat state are not all green/matched.
